summary: Close independent M2 review residuals in Customizer vector snapshots, concurrent render timing, and the negative unit-localization regression guard.
specSections: Section 2.7 test-first evidence and milestone gates

decisions.decision: Capture and validate the native-array length once, then validate and copy each own numeric index exactly once into a fresh ordinary array; never spread or invoke caller iteration. Compare compatibility snapshots by their captured lengths, and make reducers, reconciliation, and source rewriting take one owned snapshot before compatibility, equality, storage, or serialization.
decisions.rationale: Indexed validation followed by spread cloning allowed a custom Symbol.iterator to inject non-finite values after validation. Re-reading accessor-backed components or Proxy-provided length across helper and consumer calls created further time-of-check/time-of-use gaps that could shrink a two-component value to one after compatibility. One length-bounded indexed snapshot is both the validation result and the owned value, preserving dense finite vectors without an arbitrary component cap.

decisions.decision: Render elapsed progress in a component keyed by engine job ID, with an effect-local active flag and interval cleanup, instead of mutating a shared ref during ViewerPane render.
decisions.rationale: React may render a superseding tree and then suspend or abandon it while retaining the old committed UI. Render-phase ref mutation let that uncommitted job stop the old job's live interval. A keyed child resets only when the replacement commits and leaves the visible committed job running until then.

decisions.decision: Keep the positive required message-call assertions and also reject raw millimeter and compact-seconds source forms in every affected surface, with synthetic bad-form tests and an executed mutation check.
decisions.rationale: A presence-only test remained green if a raw unit literal was added alongside an existing catalog call. Negative source assertions make the one-message-authority claim regression-resistant without changing current English copy.

testEvidence.criterion: Validated vectors cannot change through iterators or repeated accessor reads
testEvidence.test: Give a dense six-component array a custom iterator that yields Infinity, then give another array a component accessor that returns a finite value only on its first read; require both owned clones to contain the exact indexed finite values and the accessor to run once.

red.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/application/parameters/customizer-schema.test.ts -t "caller-defined iterator|reads each vector" --reporter=verbose
red.outcome: ASSERTION-LEVEL RED: Test Files 1 failed (1); Tests 2 failed and 5 skipped. Spread cloning stored six Infinity values from the hostile iterator, while repeated accessor reads rejected a component whose first finite snapshot value was valid.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/application/parameters/customizer-schema.test.ts tests/application/parameters/parameter-state.test.ts tests/application/parameters/parameter-overrides.test.ts tests/application/parameters/parameter-set-codec.test.ts tests/ui/parameters/ParameterPanel.test.tsx --reporter=dot; pnpm.cmd typecheck; pnpm.cmd lint; pnpm.cmd build
green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 5 passed (5); Tests 54 passed (54); Duration 1.29s. TypeScript no-emit passed; Biome checked 304 files with no fixes and source policy passed; Vite transformed 183 modules and built successfully in 340ms.

testEvidence.criterion: An uncommitted suspended replacement cannot freeze the visible render timer
testEvidence.test: Advance committed job A to 0.3 seconds, start a transition to job B whose sibling suspends forever, require the outer fallback to remain hidden and job A to continue to 0.7 seconds; retain the direct committed supersession reset test.

red.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/viewer/ViewerPane.test.tsx -t "superseding render is suspended" --reporter=verbose
red.outcome: ASSERTION-LEVEL RED: Test Files 1 failed (1); Tests 1 failed and 11 skipped. The still-visible committed job remained frozen at 0.3 seconds instead of advancing to 0.7 seconds after the uncommitted replacement rendered and suspended.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/viewer/ViewerPane.test.tsx --reporter=verbose; pnpm.cmd typecheck; pnpm.cmd lint
green.outcome: GREEN: ViewerPane Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 12 passed (12), including direct committed supersession and abandoned-transition lifetime. TypeScript no-emit passed; Biome checked 305 files and source policy passed. Both fake-timer cases unmount before restoring real timers.

testEvidence.criterion: Vector shape cannot change between helper validation, compatibility, and state or source consumers
testEvidence.test: Use Array Proxies whose length changes across reads. Require cloneParameterValue to capture length once and reject NaN/negative lengths, then require set-value, override reconciliation, and source rewriting to use one owned two-component snapshot through their complete operation.

red.command:
pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/application/parameters/customizer-schema.test.ts -t "captures vector length" --reporter=verbose
pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/application/parameters/parameter-state.test.ts -t "snapshots a runtime vector once" --reporter=verbose
red.outcome: ASSERTION-LEVEL RED in both layers: the helper test failed 1/1 because a target [6, 7] cloned as [6] after three length reads; the reducer test failed 1/1 because a value that was compatible as length 2 was re-read and stored as [6].

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/application/parameters/customizer-schema.test.ts tests/application/parameters/parameter-state.test.ts tests/application/parameters/parameter-overrides.test.ts tests/application/parameters/parameter-set-codec.test.ts tests/ui/parameters/ParameterPanel.test.tsx --reporter=dot; pnpm.cmd typecheck; pnpm.cmd lint
green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 5 passed (5); Tests 57 passed (57); Duration 1.11s. Helper, reducer, reconciliation, and source-writing Proxy regressions each observed one length read and retained [6, 7]. TypeScript no-emit passed; Biome checked 305 files with no fixes and source policy passed.

testEvidence.criterion: Raw units cannot return beside an existing catalog call
testEvidence.test: Retain a valid messages.millimeters call while mutation-injecting the prior raw `${value} mm` form into the same scanned file; require the negative source guard to fail specifically on the raw literal, then remove the mutation and require both real-source and synthetic matcher tests to pass.

red.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/message-catalog-units.test.ts --reporter=verbose (temporary uncommitted raw-unit mutation retained the valid catalog call)
red.outcome: MUTATION RED: Test Files 1 failed (1); Tests 1 failed and 1 passed. The exact failure was `details must not contain a raw unit literal`, proving the new negative guard catches a bypass that the prior presence-only assertions missed. The mutation was then removed.

green.outcome: GREEN before the deliberate mutation: Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 2 passed (2). Final verification repeats this command after mutation removal.

questions: No vector length cap, owner-gate access, comparison-repository access, M3 work, installer work, or prohibited source was introduced.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
